commands.review_summary:
The PR makes media-understanding audio/video proxy fetch resolution target-aware and adds NO_PROXY/CIDR matching coverage for self-hosted media backends.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main resolves fetchFn before the configured media backend baseUrl is available, while target-aware NO_PROXY matching exists in proxy-env.ts and is not applied at that runner seam. I did not run a live self-hosted STT backend in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor-provided real behavior proof, a rebase over current proxy/media contracts, and maintainer/security review of egress policy before merge; automation should not repair it while proof is missing.

target.title: [AI-assisted] fix(media): bypass proxy for internal audio backends
target.author: slime-turing
